title: Helm default rbac.scope=cluster (G5)
expected: Default rbac.scope SHOULD be namespace, not cluster
evidence:
# Default values for llmsafespace.
# This is a YAML-formatted file.

# nameOverride / fullnameOverride follow standard Helm conventions.
nameOverride: ""
fullnameOverride: ""

# Namespace where the platform's own components run.
# Workspaces are created in the same namespace by default; controller can be
# configured to watch additional namespaces via .controller.watchNamespaces.
namespace:
  # If create: true, the chart will create the release namespace.
  # If you install with --namespace and --create-namespace, set this to false.
  create: false

# ------------------------------------------
notes: Recommend default 'namespace'; require operators to opt-in to cluster scope.
